questionHtml:
The average binding energy per nucleon of the 8 15 O nucleus is 7.5 MeV. What is the total energy required to separate the nucleons of one nucleus of 8 15 O ?

A.     53 MeV

B.     60 MeV

C.     113 MeV

D.     173 MeV
